name.en: Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End
name.ja: <ruby>混沌帝龍<rt>カオス・エンペラー・ドラゴン</rt></ruby> －<ruby>終<rt>しゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>焉<rt>えん</rt></ruby>の<ruby>使<rt>し</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby>－

summoning_condition.en: You can Special Summon this card from your hand face-up to your field by placing 1 LIGHT Attribute and 1 DARK Attribute monster from your Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck in any order.

requirement.en: If you have not activated any effect during the turn you Special Summoned this card the above way, pay 1000 LP.

effect.en: Send all cards in both players' hands and fields to the Graveyard. Then, inflict damage to your opponent equal to [the number of cards sent to their Graveyard by this effect] x 300.
